/usr/bin/ar qc libra_spoof_lib.a CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/cell_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/ro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/ra_rnti.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/log_csv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/ssb_sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/influx_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/prach_tx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ra_spoof_lib.dir/src/tool_config.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libra_spoof_lib.a
